children.text: Last Monday, my classmate Lele looked very worried after English class.
children.cn: 上周一，英语课后我的同学乐乐看起来非常担心。
children.notes: look: 看起来；worried: 担心的
children.statement: looked 是 look 的过去式，这里表示“看起来”。
children.explanation: 叙述过去的外表或状态。

children.text: He almost cried in the classroom because he could not read the text well.
children.cn: 他几乎要在教室里哭了，因为他读不好这篇课文。
children.notes: almost: 几乎；could not: 不能（can't的过去式）
children.statement: could 是 can 的过去式。
children.explanation: 表示过去的能力或可能性。

children.text: I came to help him and we read the text together.
children.cn: 我来帮助他，我们一起读了课文。

children.text: I read first, and then he read after me.
children.notes: first: 首先；then: 然后；read after: 跟着读
children.statement: read after me 表示“跟着我读”。

children.text: At last, he worked it out and became a better reader.
children.cn: 最后，他解决了困难，并成为了更好的朗读者。
children.notes: at last: 最后；become: 成为（became为过去式）
children.statement: became 是 become 的过去式。

children.text: I realized that everyone can make a difference by helping others.
children.cn: 我意识到每个人都可以通过帮助他人来产生影响。
children.notes: realize: 意识到；make a difference: 产生影响/起到作用
children.statement: make a difference 是本单元的主题，意为“产生影响/让世界变得更好”。

children.text: Helping others makes me feel happy and proud.
children.cn: 帮助别人让我感到开心和自豪。
children.notes: happy and proud: 开心且自豪
children.statement: helping others 是动名词短语作主语，谓语动词用单数 makes。
children.explanation: 动名词作主语视为单数。
